runTitle: Vercel Playwright MCP Targeted AI QA - 24h peak-load phrasing variants
coveredSurfaces: Vercel production AI sidebar opened from /dashboard with AI engine status Ready
Variant 1 Korean natural phrasing: '최근 하루 동안 서버 부하가 가장 높았던 시간대와 근거를 알려줘'
Variant 2 compact operator phrasing: '24h 기준 load1 peak가 언제였고 어떤 서버가 가장 영향을 줬어?'
Variant 3 explicit whole-fleet phrasing: '전체 서버 기준으로 지난 24시간 load1이 가장 높았던 시각과 상위 서버 3개를 알려줘'
/api/version confirmed production still serves v8.11.124 / cf5480e855ff2476c928b7ff7f4399c664ff70ea
/api/health returned success=true with database, cache, and ai services connected
skippedSurfaces: Full five-question conversational AI QA was not repeated to avoid unnecessary live LLM cost on an unchanged production deployment
Core route, auth, dashboard modal, Reporter Agent, Analyst Agent, mobile viewport, and Cloud Run admin monitoring surfaces were not exercised in this phrasing-only probe

aiLatencyObservations.source: Playwright MCP Performance API resource timing
Playwright MCP Performance API resource timing

plannerShadowObservations.source: Visible metadata showed '기간: 최근 1시간' for a recent-day peak-load question
Clarification UI said '특정 서버가 명시되지 않음'
Answer included a peak time and top servers, but metadata still showed '기간: 최근 1시간'

expertAssessments.rationale: Variant testing confirmed the production issue is broader than one empty/generic response: whole-fleet 24h peak-load intent is wording-sensitive, compact load1/24h phrasing triggers clarification, and passing phrasing still exposes a 1h evidence metadata mismatch.
expertAssessments.nextAction: Implement and deploy a domain evidence path that normalizes whole-fleet 24h peak/load/load1 phrasings, returns metric-grounded time slot plus top servers, and labels the evidence window accurately.

expertAssessments.rationale: This was correctly scoped as a small non-counting variant probe on unchanged production, with screenshot and structured evidence captured.

usageChecks.summary: Current Vercel billing period reviewed after targeted AI variant QA; effective 6.7213 USD, billed 0.0000 USD, chargeCount 6090.

artifacts.label: AI peak-load phrasing variants structured result

pendingImprovements.title: Production AI Assistant 24시간 피크 부하 질의가 phrasing-sensitive routing/evidence drift를 보임
pendingImprovements.note: Variant probe: natural phrasing answered with recent/current metric evidence, compact '24h/load1/peak' phrasing incorrectly requested a specific server, and explicit whole-fleet phrasing returned a useful answer but still showed recent-1h metadata and load1/CPU unit ambiguity.

notes: This run intentionally does not count toward summary because it further characterizes an already-open production AI issue on the unchanged v8.11.124 deployment.
The observed behavior supports a generic, reusable domain-evidence/provider fix rather than hard-coding one Korean prompt.
